MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2018 FOR HEARING ON DEFENDANT ALEXANDER BOUFIDISIS' MOTION FOR REHEARING - DENIED. THE COURT SHALL CORRECT THE JUDGMENT ISSUED JANUARY 4, 2018 AND CHANGE ATTORNEY FEE AWARD TO PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AWARD. PLAINTIFF ANDREA MAZENKO WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. MITCHELL CHYETTE, ESQ. APPEARED WITH DEFENDANT ALEXANDER BOUFIDIS, WHO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. JUSTIN FREELS, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
